title: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About South Indian Bank South Asia Partners:
South Indian Bank South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank South Asia Partners!
